_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: SinusBot 1.1 - Cage
author: cage@darkycage.com
description: SinusBot 1.1 for TeamSpeak and Discord, using Cage's custom Docker image and developer-provided SinusBot build.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

SINUSBOT_URL="https://github.com/DarkyCage/cage-ptero-eggs/releases/download/v1.1/sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2"
TS_VERSION="3.5.6"
TS_URL="https://files.teamspeak-services.com/releases/client/${TS_VERSION}/TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64-${TS_VERSION}.run"

apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates bzip2 wget tar curl
apt-get clean
rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

cd /mnt/server

mkdir -p TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/plugins
mkdir -p youtube-dlp

echo "Downloading custom SinusBot 1.1 build..."
wget --progress=dot:giga -O sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2 "${SINUSBOT_URL}"

echo "Extracting SinusBot..."
tar -xjf sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2
rm -f sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2

echo "Downloading TeamSpeak Client ${TS_VERSION}..."
wget --progress=dot:giga -O teamspeak-client.run "${TS_URL}"
chmod 0755 teamspeak-client.run

./teamspeak-client.run --tar xfv -C TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64
rm -f teamspeak-client.run

rm -f TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/xcbglintegrations/libqxcb-glx-integration.so

chmod +x sinusbot

if [ -f ttshlpr ]; then
    chmod +x ttshlpr
fi

if [ ! -f config.ini ]; then
    cp config.ini.dist config.ini
fi

sed -i 's|^TS3Path.*|TS3Path = "/home/container/TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/ts3client_linux_amd64"|g' config.ini

if grep -q '^YoutubeDLPath' config.ini; then
    sed -i 's|^YoutubeDLPath.*|YoutubeDLPath = "/home/container/youtube-dlp/yt-dlp"|g' config.ini
else
    echo 'YoutubeDLPath = "/home/container/youtube-dlp/yt-dlp"' >> config.ini
fi

if [ -f plugin/libsoundbot_plugin.so ]; then
    cp plugin/libsoundbot_plugin.so TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/plugins/
fi

echo "Downloading yt-dlp..."
wget --progress=dot:giga -O youtube-dlp/yt-dlp https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp
chmod 0755 youtube-dlp/yt-dlp

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "SinusBot 1.1 installation completed"
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Administrator Password
variables.description: Password assigned to the SinusBot administrator account during startup.
